meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start shipping SaaS. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code checklist to launch your MVP with speed and precision.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. The Antigravity project template provides a production-grade boilerplate, while Claude Code automates the heavy lifting. By shifting focus from syntax learning to architectural execution, you bypass the learning trap and move directly into building a monetizable, scalable SaaS product.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks consuming endless video tutorials, accumulating a graveyard of half-baked 'to-do' apps that serve no one. You are trapped in the comfort of passive learning while your competitors are already capturing market share. The gap between a hobbyist and a founder isn't code knowledge—it's the relentless pursuit of shipping.

This guide breaks the cycle. We are stripping away the fluff and moving straight to the Antigravity project template ecosystem. By combining structured boilerplate architecture with the cognitive leverage of Claude Code, you will transform your abstract idea into a deployable asset. It is time to stop building demos and start building a business.

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Initialize your project using the high-performance Antigravity boilerplate to ensure your directory structure is production-ready from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity core template with Stripe integration and Auth0 pre-configured.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business logic into database schemas, ensuring your data relationships support your specific monetization model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS, including user profiles, billing tiers, and project entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate prisma schema for the defined SaaS domain models'

steps.title: Automate API Routes
steps.description: Stop writing boilerplate CRUD code. Use Claude Code to generate type-safe API endpoints that align with your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure RESTful API routes for the project management entity using the Antigravity API patterns.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Billing
steps.description: Integrate payment processing early. Don't wait until the end; validate your revenue stream immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe checkout and webhook handlers into the existing Antigravity structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement Stripe subscription flow and handle payment success webhooks'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push your MVP to a live environment immediately to begin the feedback loop with real users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the CI/CD pipeline for Vercel deployment with environment variable management.

pro_tips: Treat your code as a disposable asset; focus on the business value, not the elegance of your functions.
Always build your 'Paywall' before your 'Feature Set' to ensure the product is actually viable.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into smaller modules weekly to prevent technical debt accumulation.
Prioritize 'Time to First Dollar' over 'Time to Perfect UI'—users pay for solutions, not pixels.
Keep your environment variables strictly separated; never commit keys, even in a private repo.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, implement a simple analytics tool to track user behavior, then focus on your first 10 paying customers through direct outreach.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. Stop waiting for permission to build something real. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
